requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Safety Testing — Mandatory for Lithium Battery Sea Freight to Mauritania
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3运输安全测试——毛里塔尼亚锂电池海运强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3運輸安全測試——茅利塔尼亞鋰電池海運強制要求

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1 Altitude Simulation, T2 Thermal Test, T3 Vibration, T4 Shock, T5 External Short Circuit, T6 Impact/Crush, T7 Overcharge, T8 Forced Discharge) for lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries of all sizes. BESS cells and modules exported from China to Mauritania are shipped predominantly by sea freight to the Port of Nouakchott (Port de l'Amitié, the main commercial port) or the Port of Nouadhibou (northern port, closer to the Western Sahara border). Since January 1, 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation accompanying lithium battery shipments under the IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code). Mauritania is a party to international maritime conventions and this requirement applies to all sea freight of lithium batteries entering Mauritanian ports — there is no Mauritania-specific exemption. All BESS cells and modules exported from China to Mauritania must be covered by a valid UN 38.3 Test Summary from an accredited laboratory before shipment.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了所有尺寸锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池的8项强制运输安全测试（T1高度模拟、T2热测试、T3振动、T4冲击、T5外部短路、T6冲击/挤压、T7过充电、T8强制放电）。从中国出口至毛里塔尼亚的BESS电芯和模组主要通过海运运抵努瓦克肖特港（友谊港，主要商业港口）或努瓦迪布港（北部港口，更靠近西撒哈拉边境）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3测试摘要是IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）下锂电池货物必须随附的强制文件。毛里塔尼亚加入国际海事公约，此要求适用于所有进入毛里塔尼亚港口的锂电池海运货物——不存在毛里塔尼亚专项豁免。从中国出口至毛里塔尼亚的所有BESS电芯和模组须在出货前由认可实验室出具有效的UN 38.3测试摘要。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了所有尺寸鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池的8項強制運輸安全測試（T1高度模擬、T2熱測試、T3振動、T4衝擊、T5外部短路、T6衝擊/擠壓、T7過充電、T8強制放電）。從中國出口至茅利塔尼亞的BESS電芯和模組主要通過海運運抵努瓦克肖特港（友誼港，主要商業港口）或努瓦迪布港（北部港口，更靠近西撒哈拉邊境）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3測試摘要是IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）下鋰電池貨物必須隨附的強制文件。茅利塔尼亞加入國際海事公約，此要求適用於所有進入茅利塔尼亞港口的鋰電池海運貨物——不存在茅利塔尼亞專項豁免。從中國出口至茅利塔尼亞的所有BESS電芯和模組須在出貨前由認可實驗室出具有效的UN 38.3測試摘要。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — applies to all sea freight of lithium batteries to Mauritanian ports (Nouakchott, Nouadhibou)
UN Model Regulations, 7th revised edition (2021) — Test Summary requirement mandatory since January 1, 2020
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — applies if any BESS components are airfreighted to Mauritania

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited testing laboratories such as UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV, or CAICT. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary from an accredited laboratory is acceptable for Mauritania-bound sea freight — the key gap is ensuring the test summary covers the specific cell model, chemistry, capacity, and configuration of the BESS units being shipped, and that it is maintained current with any cell design changes. The UN 38.3 Test Summary required since January 1, 2020 must accompany all IMDG-regulated shipments.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可测试实验室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。来自认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要可用于运往毛里塔尼亚的海运货物——主要差距在于确保测试摘要涵盖所运输BESS单元的特定电芯型号、化学体系、容量和配置，且随电芯设计变更保持最新状态。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3测试摘要须随附所有IMDG管控货物。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可測試實驗室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。來自認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要可用於運往茅利塔尼亞的海運貨物——主要差距在於確保測試摘要涵蓋所運輸BESS單元的特定電芯型號、化學體系、容量和配置，且隨電芯設計變更保持最新狀態。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3測試摘要須隨附所有IMDG管控貨物。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — acceptable for IMDG sea freight to Mauritania if the test summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped

gap.en: The gap is documentation scope and currency, not standard equivalence. UN 38.3 is a universal international requirement and Chinese-origin test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for Mauritania-bound sea freight. Exporters should verify: (a) the UN 38.3 test summary covers the specific cell model (including chemistry, capacity, and format) being exported — a summary for a different cell model or capacity is not transferable; (b) the test summary is from a currently CNAS- or ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) any cell design change (electrolyte, separator, electrode, BMS firmware affecting charge/discharge) since the original UN 38.3 testing triggers a reassessment requirement; (d) module-level and battery-pack-level assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment if they constitute a battery as defined under the IMDG Code; (e) for large BESS container systems (multi-MWh), the complete container/system transport documentation must be reviewed — UN 38.3 applies at the cell and battery/module level, but IMDG packaging and quantity limits may affect container stowage and segregation requirements.
gap.zh: 差距在于文件范围和时效性，而非标准等效性。UN 38.3是普遍国际要求，来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于运往毛里塔尼亚的海运货物。出口商应核实：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要涵盖所出口的特定电芯型号（包括化学体系、容量和规格）——针对不同电芯型号或容量的测试摘要不可转用；（b）测试摘要来自当前仍获CNAS或ILAC认可的实验室；（c）自最初UN 38.3测试以来的任何电芯设计变更（电解液、隔膜、电极、影响充放电的BMS固件）均触发重新评估要求；（d）若模组和电池包组件按IMDG规则定义构成电池，可能需要单独进行UN 38.3评估；（e）对于大型BESS集装箱系统（多MWh），须审查完整集装箱/系统运输文件——UN 38.3适用于电芯和电池/模组层级，但IMDG包装和数量限制可能影响集装箱积载和隔离要求。
gap.zht: 差距在於文件範圍和時效性，而非標準等效性。UN 38.3是普遍國際要求，來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於運往茅利塔尼亞的海運貨物。出口商應核實：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要涵蓋所出口的特定電芯型號（包括化學體系、容量和規格）——針對不同電芯型號或容量的測試摘要不可轉用；（b）測試摘要來自當前仍獲CNAS或ILAC認可的實驗室；（c）自最初UN 38.3測試以來的任何電芯設計變更（電解液、隔膜、電極、影響充放電的BMS韌體）均觸發重新評估要求；（d）若模組和電池包組件按IMDG規則定義構成電池，可能需要單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（e）對於大型BESS集裝箱系統（多MWh），須審查完整集裝箱/系統運輸文件——UN 38.3適用於電芯和電池/模組層級，但IMDG包裝和數量限制可能影響集裝箱積載和隔離要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international maritime law (IMDG Code) for all lithium battery sea freight entering Mauritanian ports — applies universally with no Mauritania-specific exemption
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport compliance under the IMDG Code is universal — a Chinese-origin test summary from an accredited laboratory is accepted for Mauritania sea freight provided it covers the specific cell model and is current. The primary risk is scope mismatch (wrong cell model or capacity in the summary) or an outdated summary after a cell design change. Verify test summary coverage and currency before each shipment. Engage a dangerous-goods shipping agent familiar with Mauritanian port DG handling at Port de l'Amitié (Nouakchott) and Port de Nouadhibou to confirm packaging, marking, stowage, and documentation requirements for BESS cell and module shipments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IMDG规则下的UN 38.3运输合规是普遍要求——来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于毛里塔尼亚海运货物，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。主要风险在于范围不匹配（测试摘要中电芯型号或容量有误）或电芯设计变更后测试摘要过期。请在每次出货前核实测试摘要的覆盖范围和时效性。请聘请熟悉毛里塔尼亚港口危险品操作（努瓦克肖特友谊港和努瓦迪布港）的危险品运输代理，确认BESS电芯和模组货物的包装、标识、积载和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IMDG規則下的UN 38.3運輸合規是普遍要求——來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於茅利塔尼亞海運貨物，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。主要風險在於範圍不匹配（測試摘要中電芯型號或容量有誤）或電芯設計變更後測試摘要過期。請在每次出貨前核實測試摘要的覆蓋範圍和時效性。請聘請熟悉茅利塔尼亞港口危險品操作（努瓦克肖特友誼港和努瓦迪布港）的危險品運輸代理，確認BESS電芯和模組貨物的包裝、標識、積載和文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Import Customs and DNPQ Conformity Requirements — Port Entry at Nouakchott and Nouadhibou
requirement_topic.zh: 进口海关及DNPQ合格要求——努瓦克肖特和努瓦迪布港口入境
requirement_topic.zht: 進口海關及DNPQ合格要求——努瓦克肖特和努瓦迪布港口入境

summary.en: BESS cells, modules, and complete container systems imported into Mauritania must pass customs clearance at the port of entry — primarily Port de l'Amitié (Friendship Port, Nouakchott) or Port de Nouadhibou. Import customs in Mauritania are administered by the Direction Générale des Douanes (DGD — Directorate General of Customs). Import duties, VAT, and other levies apply to BESS equipment unless exempted under donor/lender project agreements or government energy project exemptions. DNPQ (Direction Nationale de la Promotion de la Qualité) is Mauritania's national standardisation and metrology body; it may impose product conformity or quality requirements for electrical energy equipment imports. As of the dataset date, specific DNPQ mandatory conformity requirements for BESS cells, modules, or container systems have NOT been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources — this is a critical uncertainty that must be verified directly with DNPQ and a licensed Mauritanian customs broker before shipment. Donor/lender-financed projects often negotiate customs exemptions for project equipment as part of the host government agreement.
summary.zh: 进口至毛里塔尼亚的BESS电芯、模组和完整集装箱系统须通过入境港口海关清关——主要为努瓦克肖特友谊港或努瓦迪布港。毛里塔尼亚进口海关由国家海关总局（DGD——国家海关局）负责管理。进口关税、增值税及其他税费适用于BESS设备，除非依据捐赠方/贷款方项目协议或政府能源项目豁免获得免税。DNPQ（国家质量促进局）是毛里塔尼亚的国家标准化和计量机构；可能对电能设备进口规定产品合格或质量要求。截至本数据集日期，DNPQ针对BESS电芯、模组或集装箱系统的具体强制合格要求尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认——这是一项关键不确定性，须在出货前直接向DNPQ及获许可的毛里塔尼亚报关行核实。捐赠方/贷款方融资项目通常在与东道国政府协议中就项目设备协商关税豁免。
summary.zht: 進口至茅利塔尼亞的BESS電芯、模組和完整集裝箱系統須通過入境港口海關清關——主要為努瓦克肖特友誼港或努瓦迪布港。茅利塔尼亞進口海關由國家海關總局（DGD——國家海關局）負責管理。進口關稅、增值稅及其他稅費適用於BESS設備，除非依據捐贈方/貸款方項目協議或政府能源項目豁免獲得免稅。DNPQ（國家質量促進局）是茅利塔尼亞的國家標準化和計量機構；可能對電能設備進口規定產品合格或質量要求。截至本數據集日期，DNPQ針對BESS電芯、模組或集裝箱系統的具體強制合格要求尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認——這是一項關鍵不確定性，須在出貨前直接向DNPQ及獲許可的茅利塔尼亞報關行核實。捐贈方/貸款方融資項目通常在與東道國政府協議中就項目設備協商關稅豁免。

standards_or_laws: Direction Générale des Douanes (DGD) — Mauritania Customs — import duties and customs clearance applicable to BESS equipment (specific HS codes and duty rates for BESS cells, modules, and container systems — verify with DGD or licensed customs broker)
DNPQ (Direction Nationale de la Promotion de la Qualité) — potential product conformity requirements for BESS imports (unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with DNPQ before shipment)
Donor/lender project agreement — customs exemptions typically negotiated in host government agreements for World Bank, AfDB financed projects
ECOWAS trade regulations — Mauritania is a member of the Arab Maghreb Union but not ECOWAS; verify applicable regional trade frameworks for BESS equipment (unconfirmed)

summary.en: Chinese BESS export documentation typically includes commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin (Form A GSP or standard CO from CCPIT/CIQ), manufacturer's test reports, and UN 38.3 test summaries. For Mauritania, the HS code classification of BESS equipment determines applicable import duties — BESS container systems and cells may be classified under HS 8507 (electric accumulators) or HS 8504 (electrical transformers/converters, depending on system configuration). Chinese exporters should engage a freight forwarder and customs broker with West Africa / Mauritania experience to confirm current HS codes, duty rates, and DNPQ conformity requirements before shipment.
summary.zh: 中国BESS出口文件通常包括商业发票、装箱单、原产地证书（普惠制A类表或CCPIT/CIQ标准产地证）、制造商测试报告及UN 38.3测试摘要。对于毛里塔尼亚，BESS设备的HS编码分类决定适用进口关税——BESS集装箱系统和电芯可能归类于HS 8507（蓄电池）或HS 8504（电气变压器/转换器，取决于系统配置）。中国出口商应聘请具有西非/毛里塔尼亚经验的货运代理和报关行，在出货前确认当前HS编码、税率及DNPQ合格要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS出口文件通常包括商業發票、裝箱單、原產地證書（普惠制A類表或CCPIT/CIQ標準產地證）、製造商測試報告及UN 38.3測試摘要。對於茅利塔尼亞，BESS設備的HS編碼分類決定適用進口關稅——BESS集裝箱系統和電芯可能歸類於HS 8507（蓄電池）或HS 8504（電氣變壓器/轉換器，取決於系統配置）。中國出口商應聘請具有西非/茅利塔尼亞經驗的貨運代理和報關行，在出貨前確認當前HS編碼、稅率及DNPQ合格要求。

standards_or_laws: Chinese certificate of origin (Form A GSP or CCPIT CO) — standard Chinese export documentation for customs clearance
HS 8507 (electric accumulators) or HS 8504 — typical HS classification for BESS cells/modules and container systems (verify correct classification with Mauritanian customs broker)

gap.en: Critical uncertainty: DNPQ mandatory conformity requirements for BESS imports into Mauritania have NOT been confirmed from public sources as of the dataset date. This must be resolved before shipment. Key steps: (a) contact DNPQ directly to determine whether BESS cells, modules, or container systems require any pre-shipment conformity assessment, quality certificate, or registration with DNPQ before import; (b) engage a licensed Mauritanian customs broker to confirm current HS codes, import duty rates, VAT treatment, and any customs documentary requirements specific to BESS equipment; (c) for donor/lender-financed projects, confirm whether a customs exemption or duty drawback is available under the host government agreement (typically negotiated by the project developer with the Mauritanian government); (d) determine port handling capacity at Port de l'Amitié for oversized BESS container systems — large utility-scale BESS containers (20ft or 40ft ISO containers) require crane capacity and lay-down space; (e) road transport from Nouakchott port to inland project sites — assess road condition, load limits, and police escort requirements for heavy BESS container loads.
gap.zh: 关键不确定性：截至本数据集日期，DNPQ针对BESS进口至毛里塔尼亚的强制合格要求尚未从公开来源得到确认。出货前须解决此问题。关键步骤：（a）直接联系DNPQ，确认BESS电芯、模组或集装箱系统在进口前是否须进行任何装运前合格评定、质量证书或向DNPQ注册；（b）聘请获许可的毛里塔尼亚报关行，确认当前HS编码、进口关税税率、增值税处理及BESS设备专属海关文件要求；（c）对于捐赠方/贷款方融资项目，确认东道国政府协议下是否可享受海关豁免或关税退款（通常由项目开发商与毛里塔尼亚政府协商）；（d）确认努瓦克肖特友谊港对超大BESS集装箱系统的港口装卸能力——大型公用事业规模BESS集装箱（20英尺或40英尺ISO集装箱）需要起重机能力和堆放空间；（e）从努瓦克肖特港口至内陆项目站点的公路运输——评估重型BESS集装箱货物的道路状况、载荷限制及警察护送要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵不確定性：截至本數據集日期，DNPQ針對BESS進口至茅利塔尼亞的強制合格要求尚未從公開來源得到確認。出貨前須解決此問題。關鍵步驟：（a）直接聯繫DNPQ，確認BESS電芯、模組或集裝箱系統在進口前是否須進行任何裝運前合格評定、質量證書或向DNPQ注冊；（b）聘請獲許可的茅利塔尼亞報關行，確認當前HS編碼、進口關稅稅率、增值稅處理及BESS設備專屬海關文件要求；（c）對於捐贈方/貸款方融資項目，確認東道國政府協議下是否可享受海關豁免或關稅退款（通常由項目開發商與茅利塔尼亞政府協商）；（d）確認努瓦克肖特友誼港對超大BESS集裝箱系統的港口裝卸能力——大型公用事業規模BESS集裝箱（20英尺或40英尺ISO集裝箱）需要起重機能力和堆放空間；（e）從努瓦克肖特港口至內陸項目站點的公路運輸——評估重型BESS集裝箱貨物的道路狀況、載荷限制及警察護送要求。

mandatory_status.target: Customs clearance through DGD is mandatory for all imports; DNPQ conformity requirements for BESS not confirmed — verify directly with DNPQ and a licensed Mauritanian customs broker before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Standard Chinese export documentation required; DNPQ conformity requirements not confirmed — must be verified

source.publisher: Direction Générale des Douanes (DGD) — Mauritania Customs Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DNPQ mandatory conformity requirements for BESS imports into Mauritania have NOT been confirmed as of the dataset date — this is a critical unknown that must be resolved before shipment by contacting DNPQ directly. Import customs clearance through DGD at Port de l'Amitié (Nouakchott) or Port de Nouadhibou is mandatory. Engage a licensed Mauritanian customs broker experienced in energy project equipment imports to confirm HS codes, duty rates, and documentary requirements. For donor/lender projects, a customs exemption may be available under the host government agreement — confirm with the project developer and legal team.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，DNPQ针对BESS进口至毛里塔尼亚的强制合格要求尚未确认——这是一项关键未知因素，须在出货前直接联系DNPQ解决。须在努瓦克肖特友谊港或努瓦迪布港通过DGD强制进行进口海关清关。聘请具有能源项目设备进口经验的获许可毛里塔尼亚报关行，确认HS编码、关税税率及文件要求。对于捐赠方/贷款方项目，东道国政府协议下可能提供关税豁免——与项目开发商和法律团队确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，DNPQ針對BESS進口至茅利塔尼亞的強制合格要求尚未確認——這是一項關鍵未知因素，須在出貨前直接聯繫DNPQ解決。須在努瓦克肖特友誼港或努瓦迪布港通過DGD強制進行進口海關清關。聘請具有能源項目設備進口經驗的獲許可茅利塔尼亞報關行，確認HS編碼、關稅稅率及文件要求。對於捐贈方/貸款方項目，東道國政府協議下可能提供關稅豁免——與項目開發商和法律團隊確認。

requirement_topic.en: IMDG Dangerous Goods Documentation — Sea Freight Packaging, Marking and Classification for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: IMDG危险货物文件——BESS海运包装、标识及分类
requirement_topic.zht: IMDG危險貨物文件——BESS海運包裝、標識及分類

summary.en: Lithium batteries (Class 9 dangerous goods, UN 3480 — lithium-ion batteries, or UN 3481 — lithium-ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment) are regulated under the IMDG Code for all sea freight. BESS cells and modules shipped from China to Mauritania are subject to IMDG Code Chapter 3.3 Special Provisions (SP 188, SP 230, SP 384, SP 387, SP 389) for lithium batteries, including maximum state-of-charge (SOC) requirements during sea transport (typically ≤30% for large lithium batteries), quantity limits per package, stowage and segregation requirements on board ship, and documentation (Dangerous Goods Declaration, Material Safety Data Sheet). Complete BESS container systems (cells installed in a container with BMS) may be classified differently from loose cells and require ship captain notification and special stowage arrangements. Non-compliance with IMDG documentation and packaging requirements can result in refusal of cargo at Chinese ports of loading, or rejection and/or seizure at Mauritanian ports of entry.
summary.zh: 锂电池（第9类危险货物，UN 3480——锂离子电池，或UN 3481——设备中或与设备一起包装的锂离子电池）依据IMDG规则对所有海运货物进行管控。从中国运往毛里塔尼亚的BESS电芯和模组须遵守IMDG规则第3.3章锂电池特殊规定（SP 188、SP 230、SP 384、SP 387、SP 389），包括海运过程中的最大荷电状态（SOC）要求（大型锂电池通常≤30%）、每件包装数量限制、船上积载和隔离要求及文件要求（危险货物申报单、物质安全数据表）。完整BESS集装箱系统（电芯安装于集装箱并配有BMS）与散装电芯的分类可能不同，须通知船长并安排特殊积载。不符合IMDG文件和包装要求可能导致在中国装货港被拒绝装船，或在毛里塔尼亚入境港口被拒绝接收和/或扣押。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（第9類危險貨物，UN 3480——鋰離子電池，或UN 3481——設備中或與設備一起包裝的鋰離子電池）依據IMDG規則對所有海運貨物進行管控。從中國運往茅利塔尼亞的BESS電芯和模組須遵守IMDG規則第3.3章鋰電池特殊規定（SP 188、SP 230、SP 384、SP 387、SP 389），包括海運過程中的最大荷電狀態（SOC）要求（大型鋰電池通常≤30%）、每件包裝數量限制、船上積載和隔離要求及文件要求（危險貨物申報單、物質安全數據表）。完整BESS集裝箱系統（電芯安裝於集裝箱並配有BMS）與散裝電芯的分類可能不同，須通知船長並安排特殊積載。不符合IMDG文件和包裝要求可能導致在中國裝貨港被拒絕裝船，或在茅利塔尼亞入境港口被拒絕接收和/或扣押。

standards_or_laws: IMDG Code — Class 9 Dangerous Goods: UN 3480 (lithium-ion batteries) and UN 3481 (lithium-ion batteries in or with equipment) — mandatory for all sea freight of lithium batteries to Mauritania
IMDG Code Chapter 3.3 Special Provisions SP 188, SP 230, SP 384, SP 387, SP 389 — specific requirements for lithium battery sea freight (SOC limits, quantity limits, stowage)
UN 38.3 Test Summary — mandatory accompanying document for all IMDG-regulated lithium battery shipments since January 1, 2020
IMO Circular MSC.1/Circ.1818 (2023) — latest IMO guidance on lithium battery fire incidents and emergency response at sea

summary.en: Chinese BESS exporters with experience in international sea freight are familiar with IMDG Code requirements for lithium batteries. Chinese freight forwarders and dangerous-goods shipping agents routinely prepare Dangerous Goods Declarations (DGD), Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS/SDS), and ensure IMDG-compliant packaging, marking, and labelling for lithium battery shipments. The SOC limitation for large lithium battery sea freight (≤30%) requires coordination with the BESS manufacturer to discharge cells to the required level before shipment. For complete BESS container systems, the DG classification must be confirmed with the shipping line and Mauritanian port agent — different shipping lines may have varying acceptance policies for large BESS container systems.
summary.zh: 具有国际海运经验的中国BESS出口商熟悉IMDG规则对锂电池的要求。中国货运代理和危险品运输代理通常准备危险货物申报单（DGD）、物质安全数据表（MSDS/SDS），并确保锂电池货物符合IMDG包装、标识和标志要求。大型锂电池海运的SOC限制（≤30%）须与BESS制造商协调，在出货前将电芯放电至要求水平。对于完整BESS集装箱系统，须向船公司和毛里塔尼亚港口代理确认危险货物分类——不同船公司对大型BESS集装箱系统的接受政策可能不同。
summary.zht: 具有國際海運經驗的中國BESS出口商熟悉IMDG規則對鋰電池的要求。中國貨運代理和危險品運輸代理通常準備危險貨物申報單（DGD）、物質安全數據表（MSDS/SDS），並確保鋰電池貨物符合IMDG包裝、標識和標誌要求。大型鋰電池海運的SOC限制（≤30%）須與BESS製造商協調，在出貨前將電芯放電至要求水平。對於完整BESS集裝箱系統，須向船公司和茅利塔尼亞港口代理確認危險貨物分類——不同船公司對大型BESS集裝箱系統的接受政策可能不同。

standards_or_laws: IMDG Code compliance documentation — Chinese exporters typically use CNAS-accredited DG agents for Dangerous Goods Declaration preparation
UN 38.3 Test Summary from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratory — mandatory for IMDG compliance

gap.en: The gap is operational logistics and documentation management, not a standards gap. Key operational points for BESS sea freight to Mauritania: (a) SOC management — discharge BESS cells to ≤30% SOC before sea freight; coordinate with manufacturer on discharge procedures and BMS settings for transport; (b) DG classification of complete BESS container systems — confirm UN number (UN 3480 or UN 3481) and packing group with the freight forwarder and shipping line; complete installed BESS container systems may have different classification than loose cells; (c) Shipping line acceptance — some major shipping lines have restrictions on large lithium battery loads; confirm acceptance policy and book space early; (d) Port de l'Amitié (Nouakchott) DG handling capacity — verify that the port has IMDG-compliant handling facilities for Class 9 DG; (e) post-arrival discharge and commissioning — BESS cells arrive at ≤30% SOC; plan for on-site charging to full SOC before commissioning; confirm stable SOMELEC grid supply is available at the site before commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距在于运营物流和文件管理，而非标准差距。BESS海运至毛里塔尼亚的关键运营要点：（a）SOC管理——海运前将BESS电芯放电至≤30% SOC；与制造商协调运输时的放电程序和BMS设定；（b）完整BESS集装箱系统的危险货物分类——与货运代理和船公司确认联合国编号（UN 3480或UN 3481）及包装类别；已安装的完整BESS集装箱系统可能与散装电芯分类不同；（c）船公司接受政策——部分主要船公司对大型锂电池货物有限制；提前确认接受政策并预订舱位；（d）努瓦克肖特友谊港危险货物装卸能力——核实港口是否具备符合IMDG的第9类危险货物装卸设施；（e）到港后放电和调试——BESS电芯到达时SOC≤30%；规划现场充电至满SOC后再调试；确认调试前站点有稳定的SOMELEC电网供应。
gap.zht: 差距在於運營物流和文件管理，而非標準差距。BESS海運至茅利塔尼亞的關鍵運營要點：（a）SOC管理——海運前將BESS電芯放電至≤30% SOC；與製造商協調運輸時的放電程序和BMS設定；（b）完整BESS集裝箱系統的危險貨物分類——與貨運代理和船公司確認聯合國編號（UN 3480或UN 3481）及包裝類別；已安裝的完整BESS集裝箱系統可能與散裝電芯分類不同；（c）船公司接受政策——部分主要船公司對大型鋰電池貨物有限制；提前確認接受政策並預訂艙位；（d）努瓦克肖特友誼港危險貨物裝卸能力——核實港口是否具備符合IMDG的第9類危險貨物裝卸設施；（e）到港後放電和調試——BESS電芯到達時SOC≤30%；規劃現場充電至滿SOC後再調試；確認調試前站點有穩定的SOMELEC電網供應。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under IMDG Code for all sea freight of lithium batteries to Mauritanian ports — Class 9 DG documentation (DGD, UN 38.3 Test Summary, MSDS) required; SOC ≤30% for large lithium batteries during sea transport
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for all Chinese lithium battery exports by sea under international maritime conventions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IMDG Code Class 9 dangerous goods compliance is mandatory for all sea freight of BESS cells and modules from China to Mauritanian ports. The primary operational risks are: SOC management before shipment (≤30% required), DG classification of complete BESS container systems (confirm with freight forwarder), shipping line acceptance policies for large lithium battery loads, and Port de l'Amitié DG handling capacity. Engage a dangerous-goods freight forwarder with West Africa / Mauritania experience early in the project logistics planning stage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IMDG规则第9类危险货物合规是从中国至毛里塔尼亚港口BESS电芯和模组所有海运的强制要求。主要运营风险包括：出货前SOC管理（须≤30%）、完整BESS集装箱系统的危险货物分类（与货运代理确认）、大型锂电池货物的船公司接受政策及努瓦克肖特友谊港危险货物装卸能力。在项目物流规划阶段早期聘请具有西非/毛里塔尼亚经验的危险品货运代理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IMDG規則第9類危險貨物合規是從中國至茅利塔尼亞港口BESS電芯和模組所有海運的強制要求。主要運營風險包括：出貨前SOC管理（須≤30%）、完整BESS集裝箱系統的危險貨物分類（與貨運代理確認）、大型鋰電池貨物的船公司接受政策及努瓦克肖特友誼港危險貨物裝卸能力。在項目物流規劃階段早期聘請具有西非/茅利塔尼亞經驗的危險品貨運代理。
